text: ARAGHCHI IN OMAN: Iranian FM met Sultan Haitham at Al Barakah Palace in Muscat — first Gulf visit since war began. Sultan stressed dialogue. Araghchi expected to return to Pakistan then Moscow. Oman playing traditional mediator role between Tehran and Washington.
verificationNote: The National, PressTV, Muscat Daily. Confirmed.

text: HOUTHI RED SEA ATTACK: 3 ASBMs launched — 2 hit Panama-flagged tanker MV Andromeda Star (British-owned, carrying Russian oil from Primorsk to India) near Mokha. Minor damage, vessel continuing. 3rd missile landed near MV MAISHA. Houthis continue striking despite coalition presence.
verificationNote: UKMTO via gCaptain, Frontier Post. Confirmed.

text: KHARG ISLAND CRITICAL: Analysts say today April 26 is the critical deadline — blockade threatens permanent oil well damage if storage overflow not resolved. Iran activated 30-year-old VLCC NASHA (~2M barrels) as emergency floating storage. Bessent says 'in a matter of days' storage will be full. MEES editor disagrees: 'weeks rather than days.'
verificationNote: Gulf News, Yahoo/Benzinga, FDD analysis. Timing disputed by MEES.

text: FIRST US CRUDE REACHES JAPAN: 910K barrels arrived Tokyo Bay from Texas via Panama Canal. Tanker loaded March 22 — took 35 days. Japan to release 36M barrels from reserves May 1 (¥540B/$3.4B). Alternative supply routes slowly activating but cannot replace Hormuz volumes.
verificationNote: Nippon.com, Japan Times. Confirmed.

text: TRUMP PHONE TALKS: Says Iran sent revised proposal 'within 10 minutes' of Pakistan trip cancellation. Called it 'much better' but 'not enough.' Suggests talks could continue by phone rather than in-person: 'We're not going to spend 15 hours in airplanes.' War Powers deadline May 1 — 5 days. State Dept quietly published Epic Fury legal memo.
verificationNote: The Hill, CNBC, Just Security. Confirmed.

text: DAY 58 AM ROUNDUP: Markets closed (Saturday). Brent $104.40 (+30.8%), WTI $94.70 (+25.4%) — Fri close. Gas $4.099 AAA (+30.5%). IDF kills 6 more in Lebanon Saturday. Hezbollah strikes APC in Ramyah. Houthis hit Andromeda Star. Araghchi in Oman. Kharg storage critical. US crude arrives Japan. IMO condemns both US and Iran ship seizures.
verificationNote: AAA, TradingEconomics, New Arab, gCaptain, The National, Al Jazeera. All verified.

text: DAY 58 NOON UPDATE: Lebanese Health Ministry raises death toll to 2,491 killed (7,719 injured) since March 2 strikes resumed. IDF acknowledges striking Hezbollah Radwan force facilities + 3 rocket launcher sites overnight. EASA extends Israeli airspace warning to May 1. Three US carriers in theater first time since 2003 with George H.W. Bush arrival.
verificationNote: Naharnet, Times of Israel liveblog, Haaretz. All verified.

text: USS PINCKNEY INTERDICTION: Arleigh Burke destroyer's helicopter forced LPG tanker M/V SEVAN (Panama-flagged, OFAC-designated April 24, IMO 9177806) carrying ~200,600 barrels LPG/olefins to turn back to Iran in central Arabian Sea. No shots fired (unlike April 19 USS Spruance Touska seizure). Blockade enforcement now extending well beyond Gulf.
verificationNote: Epoch Times, Windward Maritime Intelligence. Confirmed.

text: HORMUZ TRANSITS RECOVER: 19 vessels crossed strait April 25 — 5 inbound, 14 outbound (first significant rebound). Total Gulf vessel presence rose to 892 (+126 from prior day). Sentinel-1 imagery shows 2 tankers loading at Kharg Island with 8+ VLCCs anchored south/east in waiting queue. Constrained throughput continues.
verificationNote: Windward.ai daily maritime intelligence. Confirmed.

text: ARAGHCHI POST-OMAN: 'Very fruitful visit to Pakistan, whose good offices we very much value. Have yet to see if the US is truly serious about diplomacy.' Pezeshkian to Sharif: 'Iran will not enter imposed negotiations under pressure, threats, or blockade.' Trump on Truth Social: 'We have all the cards; they have none. If they want to talk, all they have to do is call.'
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Press TV, Time, Truth Social via CNBC. All verified.

text: JP MORGAN WARNING: Brent could overshoot toward $150/bbl if Hormuz remains effectively closed into mid-May. Goldman Sachs frames situation as 'maritime trench warfare' potentially heading to 'sloppy peace.' FDD: blockade costs Iran ~$400M/day in lost revenue. Risk of permanent oil-well damage from overflow if not eased. Bessent: 'no oil waivers, Iran shuttering in days.'
verificationNote: TheStreet, Fortune, Al Jazeera. All verified.

text: DAY 58 NOON ROUNDUP: Markets closed. Brent $104.40 / WTI $94.70 (Fri close). Gas $4.099 AAA. Lebanon DT 2,491 (Health Ministry). USS Pinckney turns back tanker SEVAN. 19 vessels transited Hormuz April 25 (recovery). Pezeshkian rejects talks under blockade. Trump: 'all the cards.' WHCD shooting suspect Cole Allen charged. War Powers May 1 — 5 days.
verificationNote: AAA, Naharnet, CNN, Press TV, CNBC, Time. All verified.

text: LEBANON CEASEFIRE COLLAPSE: Hezbollah drone killed IDF Sgt. Idan Fooks (19) in Taybeh — 3rd soldier KIA during ceasefire, first in direct Hezbollah attack. 6 wounded. IDF retaliated with strikes across southern Lebanon killing 14, wounding 37. Mosques destroyed in Kfar Tebnit and Zawtar Al Sharqiya. Israel now evacuating 7 towns beyond buffer zone.
verificationNote: Times of Israel, JPost, Rappler, L'Orient Today. All verified.

text: NETANYAHU ESCALATION: PM says Hezbollah 'dismantling the ceasefire' after Fooks KIA. Orders IDF to 'operate with force.' Israel issued evacuation orders for 7 towns north of buffer zone — Meidoun, Shoukin, Yahmar, Arnoun, Zawtar Al Sharqiya, Zawtar Al Gharbiyeh, Kfar Tebnit. Hezbollah counter-claims 500+ Israeli violations. Home Front Command restricts northern gatherings.
verificationNote: Times of Israel, Al Arabiya, New Arab. Confirmed.

text: ARAGHCHI-PUTIN SUMMIT: Iran FM met Putin, Lavrov, Ushakov at Kremlin — briefed on ceasefire and Iran's red lines (nuclear program, Hormuz). Came after Oman/Pakistan tour. Trump on Fox: 'If they want to talk, they can call.' Pezeshkian: won't enter 'forced negotiations.' Peace talks fully stalled. War Powers deadline May 1 (4 days).
verificationNote: Kremlin.ru, Euronews, NBC News, US News. All verified.

text: OIL SPIKE: Brent surged to $107.97 (+2.5%) in Sunday electronic trading — stalled peace talks + WHCD shooting aftermath. WTI near $96. Monday open expected volatile. OFAC froze $344M IRGC/Hezbollah crypto (TRON wallets). Hengli Petrochemical (Dalian) sanctioned. Jones Act waiver extended 90 days through August. 40+ tankers using waiver.
verificationNote: CNBC, Crowdfund Insider, Al Jazeera. All verified.

text: HORMUZ DAY 56: Bloomberg reports only single small coastal cargo ship leaving Gulf Sunday morning. Dual blockade continues — US blocks Iran-bound, IRGC blocks everyone else. 37 ships redirected by US Navy (up from 34). MSC Francesca + Epaminondas in IRGC custody Day 4. IRGC: Hormuz won't reopen 'under any circumstances' while US blockade exists. 800+ vessels stranded, 40K seafarers trapped.
verificationNote: Bloomberg Hormuz Tracker, Yahoo Finance, The National. Confirmed.

text: DAY 59 PM PT ROUNDUP: Brent $107.97 / WTI ~$96 (Sunday electronic). Gas $4.031 AAA. Lebanon DT ~2,511 (+14 killed April 26). IDF Sgt. Fooks KIA by Hezbollah drone. Israel evacuates 7 towns. Araghchi meets Putin in Moscow. Trump: 'they can call.' Hormuz: 37 ships redirected. OFAC froze $344M crypto. War Powers May 1 — 4 days.
verificationNote: CNBC, Times of Israel, Kremlin.ru, AAA, NBC News. All verified.

text: BREAKING — IRAN HORMUZ PROPOSAL: Iran transmitted new deal to US via Pakistani mediators — offering to reopen Strait of Hormuz and end war while postponing nuclear program talks. White House received but no response yet. Araghchi told mediators: no internal consensus on nuclear demands. Trump to hold Situation Room meeting Monday.
verificationNote: Axios (Barak Ravid), Bloomberg, Times of Israel. Multiple US officials cited.

text: REVEALED — IRON DOME IN UAE: Axios reports Israel secretly deployed Iron Dome battery + several dozen IDF operators to UAE early in the war. First deployment outside US/Israel. Intercepted dozens of Iranian missiles. Iran fired ~550 BMs/CMs and ~2,200 drones at UAE. Authorized by Netanyahu after MBZ call.
verificationNote: Axios, Times of Israel, Haaretz. Israeli and US officials cited.

text: HORMUZ DAY 56 UPDATE: CENTCOM reports 38 ships now redirected (up from 37). US mine-sweeping operations underway with Avenger-class minesweepers from Japan. Trump ordered ops 'tripled up.' Experts warn clearing could take months. MSC Francesca + Epaminondas in IRGC custody Day 5. Iran's new proposal includes Hormuz reopening offer.
verificationNote: CENTCOM, PBS, Military.com, Axios. All confirmed.

text: ARAGHCHI IN ST. PETERSBURG: Iran FM arrived in St. Petersburg (correction — not Moscow) for Putin meeting Monday. Araghchi: 'Good opportunity to consult with Russian colleagues on war developments.' Completes 3-country diplomatic tour: Pakistan → Oman → Russia. Iran building coalition as US talks stall.
verificationNote: CNN, Euronews, Al Jazeera. Confirmed by Araghchi Telegram post.

text: IRAN FLIGHTS RESUME: Iran resumed commercial flights from Imam Khomeini International Airport (April 25) — first since Feb 28. Flights to Istanbul, Muscat, Medina. Domestic Tehran-Mashhad also resumed after 56-day hiatus. Eastern airports prioritized. Sign of normalization even as war continues.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye. Confirmed.

text: DAY 59 LATE PM PT ROUNDUP: Iran's new Hormuz proposal (Axios). Iron Dome in UAE revealed. King Charles arrives DC — Iran on agenda. Trump-Starmer call on Hormuz urgency. Araghchi in St. Petersburg for Putin. CENTCOM: 38 ships redirected. Lebanon DT 2,509. Bennett-Lapid alliance. Brent $107.97. Gas $4.031. War Powers May 1 — 3 days.
